summary: Added merchant fulfillment provider UI: PATCH admin endpoint + admin HTML section with per-product provider dropdown, wired storefront.js to honour explicit fulfillment_provider field in catalog.json.

commits_made: 49ba082 - feat(admin): add merchant fulfillment provider UI + PATCH endpoint
context_for_next_worker.approach_used: Added GET /api/admin/products/fulfillment + PATCH /api/admin/products/:id/fulfillment to adminRoutes.js (reads/writes catalog.json); added 'Product Fulfillment' sidebar nav item and section to admin.html with a per-product <select> (stripe_digital/printful/lulu/arxmint/manual) and variant ID input; updated bookToProduct() in storefront.js to map explicit fulfillment_provider values to the correct fulfillment type string used by checkout routing.
context_for_next_worker.what_worked: Reading/writing catalog.json from adminRoutes follows the same pattern used by the existing books CRUD endpoints.
context_for_next_worker.what_didnt: None — clean implementation on first attempt.
context_for_next_worker.next_recommended_step: Next pending tasks include 011-P2-memberships-subscriptions.md and 012-P2-machine-payable-endpoints.md — both are independent and can proceed immediately.
